verses.2: His tabernacle is also in Salem.
verses.3: There he broke the flaming arrows of the bow,
verses.6: At your rebuke, God of Jacob,
verses.7: You, even you, are to be feared.
verses.10: Surely the wrath of man praises you.
verses.11: Make vows to the LORD your God, and fulfill them!
verses.12: He will cut off the spirit of princes.
